response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist full-stack engineer with web, mobile and some embedded experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and the resume shows only a brief stint writing C/C++ components at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015). There is no evidence of large-scale distributed-systems or cloud-compute platform work in C++, and no formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not map onto the C++ infrastructure leadership profile this position demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD and craftsmanship mindset
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency micro-services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) shows distributed-systems exposure
Active mentor/teacher via workshops, talks and courses, indicating leadership and communication skills
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ minimum — only ~6 months of C/C++ work visible
No demonstrated cloud-compute platform or large-scale infrastructure ownership in C++
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud-compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Strong engineering craftsmanship and mentoring track record
